name: tpi-region-eu
description: Regional index for EU — frontier-shaped models available in AWS eu-west-1 (Bedrock) and Azure westeurope (OpenAI Service). Same 19-member candidate set as TPI-USEast. Members not yet GA in EU regions (Mistral Small, Llama 3.3 70B on AWS) are reported as unresolved — the geometric mean computes over what IS available, making the regional capability gap legible.
